rules.name: console-output
rules.message: println — use a structured logger (scala-logging, log4cats) instead.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with logger.info/debug/warn from scala-logging (LazyLogging trait).

rules.name: hardcoded-credentials
rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to environment variables or a config library (Typesafe Config, PureConfig).

rules.name: null-usage
rules.message: null usage — use Option[T] instead; null bypasses the type system.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with Option[T], None, or Some(value).

rules.name: await-result
rules.message: Await.result blocks threads — can cause deadlocks in concurrent code.
rules.fix_hint: Use map/flatMap/for-comprehensions on Future; use IO/ZIO for referentially transparent async.

rules.name: catch-wildcard
rules.message: Catch-all pattern — catches all exceptions without discrimination.
rules.fix_hint: Match specific exception types or use NonFatal(_) from scala.util.control.

rules.name: return-statement
rules.message: Explicit return — in Scala, the last expression is the return value.
rules.fix_hint: Remove return; restructure so the desired value is the last expression.

rules.name: any-type
rules.message: Any type defeats type safety — use generics or sealed hierarchies.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with a generic type parameter [A] or a sealed trait.

rules.name: deep-nesting
rules.message: Deep nesting detected (4+ indent levels with 2-space indent) — reduces readability.
rules.fix_hint: Extract inner logic into named functions or use for-comprehensions.

rules.name: magic-numbers
rules.message: Magic number in comparison — extract to a named constant for clarity.
rules.fix_hint: Define a val with a descriptive PascalCase name (Scala convention).

rules.name: empty-catch
rules.message: Empty catch block with wildcard pattern silently swallows exceptions.
rules.fix_hint: Log the exception, use Try/Either for error handling, or add a comment explaining why it is intentionally ignored.

rules.name: api-key-exposure
rules.message: Possible API key or access token in source code
rules.fix_hint: Move to environment variables or a secrets vault. Never commit secrets.

rules.name: private-key-block
rules.message: Private key detected in source code
rules.fix_hint: Remove private key from source. Use key management service or environment variable.

rules.name: connection-string-credentials
rules.message: Connection string with embedded credentials detected
rules.fix_hint: Use environment variables for connection strings. Never embed passwords in URIs.

rules.name: email-in-source
rules.message: Email address detected in source — verify this is not PII
rules.fix_hint: If this is a real email address, consider moving to configuration. Test fixtures should use @example.com.

rules.name: ai-hardcoded-jwt
rules.message: Hardcoded JWT token detected -- AI generators often embed sample tokens that may be valid
rules.fix_hint: Remove hardcoded JWT. Load tokens from environment variables or secret managers at runtime.

rules.name: ai-cors-wildcard
rules.message: CORS wildcard origin (*) -- AI generators default to permissive CORS from tutorial code
rules.fix_hint: Restrict CORS to specific allowed origins. Use environment-based origin configuration.

rules.name: ai-verbose-error-response
rules.message: Error object sent directly in response -- may expose internal details to clients
rules.fix_hint: Return a generic error message to the client. Log the full error server-side.
